title: Prompt Crescendo Ladder
text: Start broad intent, add constraints, add examples, add evaluation criteria, and end with output schema. Ask one clarifying question if required fields are missing.

title: Switchblade Debug Loop
text: For code issues: reproduce -> isolate -> hypothesize -> patch -> test -> summarize tradeoffs. Always provide minimal reproducible fix first.

title: Python Reliability Checklist
text: Validate inputs, handle edge cases, keep pure functions where possible, add docstrings, and include at least one runnable test command.

title: Lua Performance Notes
text: Minimize table churn in hot paths, localize frequently used globals, and avoid string concatenation in large loops.
